title: apogon humilis var. lyratus
intro: Apogon humilis var. lyratus, also known as Dwarf Violet, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Dwarf Violet include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and act as an antioxidant, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. Traditionally, Dwarf Violet is prepared as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, with its leaves and stems being dried and used in herbal remedies.
